title: 2PCS Milkshake Glasses, Ice Cream Sundae Glasses Reusable Dessert Glass Clear Dessert Cups with Footed Base Soda Fountain with 2 Spoons for Juice, Ice Cream, Soda (12.98oz / 380 ml, Clear)
features: 【Premium Glass Material|Durable & Crystal Clear Design】 The product includes two 380ml glass dessert cups and two spoons。Crafted from high-quality thickened glass (0.5cm thickness), these dessert cups offer exceptional durability and clarity to showcase vibrant layers of milkshakes, parfaits, and cocktails. Unlike thin glassware, our cups resist cracking and cloudiness, ensuring elegant presentations for family gatherings or commercial use while remaining dishwasher safe for easy cleanup

【Multi-Purpose Versatility|Perfect for Hot & Cold Beverages】 With a generous 380ml capacity, these glasses seamlessly transition from iced coffee and matcha lattes to cocktails, beer, and desserts like sundae or ice cream floats. The wide mouth accommodates easy scooping and sipping, eliminating the need for separate containers for different drinks—ideal for home bars, cafes, and party servings

【Nostalgic Elegance|Elevate Dining & Entertainment Experience】 The crystal-clear glass showcases vibrant dessert layers and drink colors, adding a touch of classic soda fountain charm to modern tables. Their stable base prevents spills during lively events, making them essential for birthday parties, holiday celebrations, or romantic dinners where aesthetics matter

【Included Spoons|Enhanced Convenience for Dessert Lovers】 Each set includes two matching spoons (8.3cm) designed for effortless enjoyment of layered desserts and drinks. The spoons fit neatly inside the glasses for compact storage, solving the problem of misplaced utensils and ensuring a complete serving experience for milkshakes, affogatos, or fruit parfaits

【Space-Saving Set|Practical Storage for Modern Kitchens】 Despite holding 380ml each, the glasses stack neatly thanks to their uniform shape, optimizing cabinet space. The set’s total weight (850g) ensures stability during use without overcrowding shelves—a smart solution for small homes or businesses seeking versatile, durable glassware
description: Sip, Scoop, & Savor—All in One Glass! Elevate Your Moments with Our 380ml Dessert Cup Set (2 Glass Cups + 2 Spoons Included!) Transform Every Drink & Dessert into a Visual Masterpiece! Indulge in the perfect fusion of elegance and functionality with our 380ml Premium Glass Dessert Cup Set—where thickened durability meets timeless soda fountain charm. Whether crafting Instagram-worthy parfaits, swirling iced matcha lattes, or hosting a cocktail night, these versatile glasses deliver unmatched clarity and resilience for all occasions. Why This Set Stands Out: ✅ Crystal-Clear & Extra Thick (0.5cm!): Made from superior glass that resists cloudiness and chipping, ensuring your layered desserts and vibrant drinks shine brilliantly—day after day. ✅ From Iced Coffee to Cocktails: With a 380ml capacity and wide mouth, these glasses effortlessly transition from morning cold brews to evening espresso martinis—no need for multiple containers! ✅ Includes 2 Matching Spoons: Specially designed spoons (8.3cm) rest neatly on the rim for hygienic storage, making every scoop of ice cream or stir of a affogato effortlessly elegant. ✅ Dishwasher-Safe & Stackable: Cleanup is a breeze, and the space-saving design stacks neatly in cabinets—ideal for cozy kitchens or bustling coffee shops. ✅ Nostalgic Yet Modern: Evoke retro diner vibes while serving contemporary creations at parties, cafes, or romantic dinners. The stable base prevents spills even in lively settings! Perfect For: Home Bartenders shaking margaritas or pouring stout beers Brunch Lovers building yogurt parfaits or smoothie bowls Entertainers hosting sundae bars or cocktail parties Daily Use for iced coffee, matcha, juices, and desserts Product Specifications: Material: Glass Dimensions: Spoon: 8.3cm/3.26inch Cup: 18.6*8.2*7.8cm/7.32*3.22*3.07inch Color: Clear Package Includes: 2 glasses 2 spoons
